docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY ISMAEL, MOHUMMED AS TO DEFENDANT TARAKJI, MOHAMAD ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-17-2015 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. PLAINTIFF WAS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (D-506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-17-2015 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO DEC-15-2015 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
